steps.title: Contrast the counts
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the number of meteorite falls with the number of meteorite finds. The relevant notes give both counts: about 1,200 falls and over 60,000 finds.

steps.title: Use both numbers
steps.content: The matching option includes both figures and uses contrasting language to show the difference. Choice A and Choice B only define the categories, and Choice C gives the number of falls without the number of finds. The answer is D.
